reason: Multi-prime-requisite XP tiers are prose in the SRD, not a table: 'An elf with at least 13 INT and STR gains a 5% bonus to experience. An elf with an INT of at least 16 and a STR of at least 13 receives a +10% XP bonus.' Hand-authored here rather than brittle prose parsing. Per RAW these tiers carry no penalties: the standard table applies 'to characters with a single prime requisite' and the class description notes only bonuses.

Multi-prime-requisite XP tiers are prose in the SRD, not a table: 'A halfling with at least 13 in one prime requisite gains a 5% bonus to experience. If both DEX and STR are 13 or higher, the halfling gets a +10% bonus.' The either-or +5% condition is expressed as two single-minimum tiers under best-first, first-match-wins evaluation. Per RAW these tiers carry no penalties.
